title: viola odorata subsp. beraudii
intro: Viola odorata subsp. beraudii, also known as the fragrant violet or mountain violet, is a plant species within the viola genus, characterized by its sweet fragrance and delicate purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Viola odorata subsp. beraudii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Viola odorata subsp. beraudii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
